title: Copper Rails
description: Changes all the Rails' recipes to include Copper!
body:
![Project Title: "Copper Rails"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9feb119ad9d80d452e1f0e72366e7efe6cbef52.png)

---
### RESOURCE PACK REQUIRED TO CORRECTLY VIEW ITEMS IN-GAME
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)
---
**Copper Rails** is a small Data Pack that replaces the base ingredients in Crafting recipes of Rails with Copper.

![Isometric render of the updated rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a579676f46b12f8f0615e28eaddbcd56195a3878.png)
---
Specifically, Copper Rails' objective is to fill a gap by making Copper more useful.

Take a look at this project's images for the specific Crafting recipes.

---
### Installation and Compatibility

Copper Rails is fully compatible with **MC 1.17 and all its later versions**, including the latest **1.21.8**.

To properly install Copper Rails, both the Data Pack and the Resource Pack must be installed.

To manually install the Data Pack, simply drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'datapack' folder inside your world folder.
To manually install the required Resource Pack, drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'resourcepacks' folder inside your main MC directory.

Copper Rails is extremely lightweight and is compatible with Multiplayer, as long as the Resource Pack is correctly loaded.

---

If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
